reasoning_details.text:
We need to translate the chunk into Russian, preserving markdown structure, code blocks, etc. Also need to adjust relative URLs to have ../ prefix. The original relative URLs: ./hero-wide.webp, ./square-200.webp, ./inline-url-diagram-dark.svg, ./hero-concept-8-drawers.webp. Need to prefix with ../. Also any other relative URLs: the link to Internet-Draft is absolute, keep. The link in blockquote "The database world..." is internal? It's just text. The link in alternative formats: vercel://... includes JSON param with quotes; keep as is.

Also need to preserve frontmatter, translate title, subTitle, maybe cover_alt etc but there is no cover_alt in frontmatter. Only title, subTitle. Need to set language to "Russian". The frontmatter currently has no language field; we need to add? The rule: translate only reader-facing frontmatter values: language, title, subTitle, cover_alt, cover_credit. If a language field exists, set it exactly to "Russian". It doesn't exist, but we could add? Probably not required. But we can add language: Russian. However they said preserve key order and all non-reader-facing metadata keys. Adding a new key might break order. Safer to leave as is, but maybe we need to add language field? The instruction: "If a language field exists, set it exactly to "Russian"." It doesn't exist, so we don't need to add. So only translate title and subTitle.

Title: "It's Time for llm:// Connection Strings" -> "Пора использовать строки подключения llm://". SubTitle: "Simplify Model & Provider Config with `llm://` URLs" -> "Упростите конфигурацию модели и провайдера с помощью URL‑ов `llm://`". Keep backticks.

Now translate body. Keep code blocks unchanged. Translate prose, preserving paragraph breaks.

Also need to adjust image URLs: ![the parts of a LLM connection string](./inline-url-diagram-dark.svg) -> prefix with ../ => ../inline-url-diagram-dark.svg. Same for hero-concept-8-drawers.webp.

Also the cover images in frontmatter: cover_full_width: ./hero-wide.webp -> should be ../hero-wide.webp? The rule: "Preserve ALL relative URL paths for images, CSS, links, or other resources should prefix/prepend with a `../`." So need to modify those values. So cover_full_width: ../hero-wide.webp, cover_mobile: ../square-200.webp, cover_icon: ../square-200.webp.

Also social_image: desktop-social.webp is relative; need ../desktop-social.webp.

Now translate blockquote text, etc.

Let's produce final output.
